prompt: A cinematic rear three-quarter tracking shot of a futuristic white Audi supercar racing through a dense neon-lit city at night on a wet street, viewed from a very low angle close to the rear wheel. The car has a sleek widebody coupe silhouette, glossy pearl white body panels, a black rear fascia, and a continuous thin LED taillight strip with segmented red and white light elements stretching across the tail. The glowing Audi four-ring logo is illuminated in white at the center rear, with a stylized glowing model badge beneath it that reads "tron" in a futuristic font. The rear bodywork is partially removed or transparently open to reveal exposed high-performance mechanical components: 1 large rectangular metallic battery or power unit mounted low at the back, 3 visible thick exhaust or cooling pipes spanning across the rear, 1 visible gearbox or motor assembly near the center-right, and a deep black rear diffuser with 2 large fins. The car rides on oversized deep-dish black wheels with ultra-wide rear tires, and the tire sidewalls feature bright white Japanese-style lettering around the circumference. Use strong motion blur in the background and along the road surface to imply high speed, with sharp focus on the car body and exposed machinery. Surround the scene with abstract urban bokeh, streaking neon signage, reflections of red, blue, and white city lights across the wet pavement and glossy bodywork. High contrast, cyberpunk atmosphere, realistic automotive photography, dramatic nighttime lighting, ultra-detailed metal textures, cinematic lens, dynamic composition, speed, power, futuristic engineering.
